name: SmartMouth Design Tokens — Colors
description: SmartMouth uses a unique dual-color activation system as a core brand differentiator. Green = freshly activated (zinc ions active). Blue = post-activation. White dominates for clinical trustworthiness.

activation-green.usage: Primary action states, CTAs, freshly activated product visualization, success states
activation-green.brand-meaning: Represents the moment of zinc ion activation — product is working at full strength

efficacy-blue.usage: Secondary states, information panels, post-activation product visualization
efficacy-blue.brand-meaning: Represents the continued zinc ion protection after initial activation

clinical-white.usage: Primary backgrounds, dominant surface color, product photography backgrounds

surface-hover.usage: Hover states, alternate row backgrounds, subtle panels

activation-fade.usage: Hero sections, activation visualization, premium product callouts

green-fade.usage: Subtle green backgrounds for feature sections

notes: SmartMouth's green-to-blue color shift is a signature brand element — their mouthwash literally turns from green to blue as zinc ions activate. Use this visual metaphor in animations and state transitions.
